_comment: Schema reference only. The live list lives in src/settings.yml under static_data (used for both local preview and production). Each item: icon (see README for keys), tag, title, body.

recommendations.title: Make a Splash at the Lagoon
recommendations.body: Your stay includes full Desert Color access — a 2.5-acre lagoon with sandy beaches just a short walk from the door.

recommendations.title: Explore Zion & Beyond
recommendations.body: You're 54 miles from Zion, 20 from Sand Hollow, and 15 from Tuacahn. Pack the cooler and make a day of the red rock.
